skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: The system of equations above has solutions (x, y). What is one possible value of x?
rationale: Setting (x − 2)2 = 3x − 6 = 3(x − 2). Let u = x − 2: u2 = 3u, so u(u − 3) = 0. Thus u = 0 (x = 2) or u = 3 (x = 5).
